title: RewardConfig
description: Full reward distribution configuration for a market-reward token pair in the Exactly Protocol RewardsController, defining how EXA or esEXA tokens are distributed to depositors and borrowers.

market.description: Address of the Market contract receiving this reward distribution

reward.description: Address of the ERC-20 reward token (EXA or esEXA)

priceFeed.description: Chainlink-compatible price feed address for the reward token, used to value rewards in USD

start.description: Unix timestamp when the reward distribution begins

distributionPeriod.description: Duration of the distribution program in seconds

targetDebt.description: Target total borrow debt the program aims to incentivize, in underlying token wei

totalDistribution.description: Total reward tokens to be distributed over the entire program period, in reward token wei

undistributedFactor.description: Factor applied to undistributed rewards that accumulate when utilization is below target, scaled by 1e18

flipSpeed.description: Speed at which the deposit/borrow reward split adjusts toward the optimal ratio, scaled by 1e18

compensationFactor.description: Factor that compensates depositors when borrow activity is below target, scaled by 1e18

transitionFactor.description: Sigmoid curve factor controlling the smooth transition of reward allocation, scaled by 1e18

borrowAllocationWeightFactor.description: Weight factor applied to borrow-side reward allocation calculation, scaled by 1e18

depositAllocationWeightAddend.description: Addend applied to deposit-side reward allocation weight, scaled by 1e18

depositAllocationWeightFactor.description: Weight factor applied to deposit-side reward allocation calculation, scaled by 1e18
